title: rhododendron eriocarpum
intro: Rhododendron eriocarpum, also known as the pink azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rhododendron eriocarpum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron eriocarpum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
